title: The Science of Rain
premise_summary: Shadow explains that clouds sneeze rain, burp thunder, and play tag with lightning. Pip gives up.
cover_description: A cartoon owl wearing lab goggles pointing at a cotton candy cloud that is sneezing rain.
script:
[TITLE: The Science of Rain]
[CHARACTERS: Shadow, Sunny, Pip, Melody]

[HOST_INTRO]
MELODY: Ohhh, you’re not going to believe this one. I found Shadow and Sunny having a very serious talk about the weather. And Pip? Well... Pip was there too.

[/HOST_INTRO]

[THE_CONVERSATION]
SHADOW: According to my calculations, clouds are made of cotton candy.

SUNNY: This is fine! This is completely fine.

PIP: I said this would happen. I SAID.

SUNNY: Cotton candy clouds sound lovely.

SHADOW: Indeed. And when they get too heavy, they sneeze.

[SFX: tiny_squeak]

PIP: Clouds don’t sneeze!

SHADOW: They do. It’s called rain.

[PAUSE: 400]

SUNNY: Oh! So that’s why it’s wet!

PIP: No! That’s not—

SHADOW: And thunder? That’s just the clouds burping.

[SFX: gentle_rumble]

PIP: That’s not even—

SUNNY: I love a good cloud burp!

SHADOW: Lightning is their way of playing tag.

[SFX: soft_ding]

PIP: I give up.

[SFX: pillow_thud]

SUNNY: This is fine! This is completely fine.

SHADOW: And hurricanes? Just cloud dance parties.

[SFX: slide_whistle_up]

PIP: ...I’m going to bed.

[SFX: warm_tada]

SHADOW: According to my calculations... hmm.

[PAUSE: 600]

SUNNY: Can we go to a dance party tomorrow?

[SFX: soft_splat]

[/THE_CONVERSATION]

[THE_END]
MELODY: And that, my friend, is why you should never ask Shadow about the weather. [BREAK] ...Or maybe you should. Goodnight!

[/THE_END]
host_intro: Ohhh, you’re not going to believe this one. I found Shadow and Sunny having a very serious talk about the weather. And Pip? Well... Pip was there too.
host_outro: And that, my friend, is why you should never ask Shadow about the weather. ...Or maybe you should. Goodnight!
